description: Create a modern residential building (12m x 8m) with 3m high walls. Model a butterfly roof (inverted-V) on top by dividing the roof face east-west and raising the north and south edges to approximately 3.7m, keeping the center valley at 3m. Then, use the Skelion plugin to install solar panels in landscape orientation on the south-facing roof slope. Save the completed model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\butterfly_solar.skp'.
